name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Reference Sets)
notes:
This Building Block defines communication with a potential hostile IP, categorized by reference sets.

Note: The reference sets starting with "XFE ATPF" prefixes are automatically managed by the Threat Intelligence app. This requires a paid subscription.

The other reference sets provided by the Threat Intelligence App can be used to include third party Threat Intelligence feeds. Tune these Reference Sets with the adapted Time to Live for each element.

See the blog https://ibm.biz/BdPEXv for details.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Reference Sets) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event context is Local to Local

when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv6',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-scanning_ipv4',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-scanning_ipv6',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv4',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv6',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv6',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv4',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv6',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv6',destinationaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv6',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-scanning_ipv4',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-scanning_ipv6',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv4',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv6',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv6',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv4',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv6',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv6',sourceaddress) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet
